items.title: Meta secures hacked Instagram accounts as users claim its AI enabled the hackers
items.summary: Some social media users alleged that Meta’s own AI support chatbot was used by the hackers to take over accounts
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: VC funding dries in May; Fertility treatment with compassion
